name: Multimodal Review Assistant
summary: Reusable review helper that inspects page deltas, source artifacts, and authority conflicts before approval.
description: This package represents a minimal internal skill registry entry. It bundles prompts and workflow expectations for review tasks that need page diffs, artifact evidence, and grounded Ask AI follow-up flows.

metadataJson.packageScopeDefinition: Workflow pack combining prompt instructions, evidence triage expectations, and release checkpoints.
